title: [ProfCheck][Matrix] Propagate profile information for selects
author: boomanaiden154
description:
LowerMatrixIntrinsics creates new selects in the process of lowering
matrix intrinsics. The condition of such selects remains the same as
before. Because of this, we can directly propagate the profile
information for all selects on scalar conditions.

tests.test_body:
define void @select_2x2_vcond_shape5(ptr %cond, ptr %lhs, ptr %rhs, ptr %out) {
  %lhsv = load <4 x float>, ptr %lhs, align 16
  %condv = call <4 x i1> @llvm.matrix.column.major.load.v4i1.i64(ptr %cond, i64 1, i1 false, i32 1, i32 4)
  %rhsv = call <4 x float> @llvm.matrix.column.major.load.v4f32.i64(ptr %rhs, i64 1, i1 false, i32 1, i32 4)
  %op = select <4 x i1> %condv, <4 x float> %lhsv, <4 x float> %rhsv
  store <4 x float> %op, ptr %out, align 16
  ret void
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: read)
declare <4 x float> @llvm.matrix.column.major.load.v4f32.i64(ptr nocapture, i64, i1 immarg, i32 immarg, i32 immarg) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: read)
declare <4 x i1> @llvm.matrix.column.major.load.v4i1.i64(ptr nocapture, i64, i1 immarg, i32 immarg, i32 immarg) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: read) }
